sentence: 照顾‘左邻右舍’，不能搞先进迁就落后，不能搞平均主义
translation_en: Take care of "left neighbors and right households", do not practice advanced accommodating backward, do not practice equality

sentence: 这件事真叫他左右两难
translation_en: This really puts him in an awkward position on both sides.

sentence: 我们需要制定必要的规章制度，但不可过于繁琐，弄得作茧自缚，捆住自己的手脚
translation_en: We need to establish necessary regulations, but they should not be overly complicated, so as not to tie our own hands and feet.

sentence: 有些人只会坐而论道，而不办实事
translation_en: Some people only talk about things but do not actually get anything done.

sentence: 我看他们实在是坐失机宜，让敌人多准备了一天一夜
translation_en: I think they have missed their chance, allowing the enemy to prepare for an entire day and night.

sentence: 别人有困难时，我们要热心帮助，决不能坐视不救
translation_en: When others are in difficulty, we should show great concern and help them out without hesitation, never standing by idly and watching as if nothing is happening.

sentence: 从早到晚，长椅上都是坐无虚席
translation_en: From morning till night, the benches are always full without empty seats.

sentence: 哪里有压迫，哪里就有反抗。人民大众不会坐以待毙
translation_en: Where there is oppression, there will be resistance. The people will not sit idly by.
